imageAlt: PayPal: Phase 2 (Existing Users) roadmap item preview image
title: PayPal: Phase 2 (Existing Users)
summaryBody: Allow FreeAgent users who’d previously connected their PayPal accounts (via the legacy Classic api) to migrate these acconts over to the new api. This means that they can seamlessly transfer the sycing and categorisation of PayPal transactions into FreeAgent as well as request payments via their FreeAgent invoices using their PayPal wallet, credit/debit cards and for consumers PayPal’s Buy in 3 0% payment installments
detailBody: Allow FreeAgent users who’d previously connected their PayPal accounts (via the legacy Classic api) to migrate these acconts over to the new api.
